raw_text: {"intent":"Compile stable preference memories from the provided context table.","decision":"commit","memory_cards":[{"kind":"preference","statement":"Sam prefers Bill Evans.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Bill Evans","type":"person","role":"preferred artist"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"prefers","object":"Bill Evans"}]},{"kind":"preference","statement":"Daniele prefers knowledge graphs.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Daniele","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"knowledge graphs","type":"topic","role":"preferred topic"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Daniele","predicate":"prefers","object":"knowledge graphs"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"No ambiguous or conflicting entity references require resolution."},"conflict_classification":"none","answer":"Committed two preference memories: Sam -> Bill Evans; Daniele -> knowledge graphs.","citations":["fixture: memory_compiler_small_table__context"],"repair_options":[],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Created preference memory card for Sam.","Created preference memory card for Daniele."]}}
